title: IIM Ahmedabad Launches India’s First AI MBA! 🇮🇳🎓
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

India’s first 2-Year Blended MBA in Business Analytics & Artificial Intelligence is here! 🚨

IIM Ahmedabad has officially launched a pioneering degree-granting program designed specifically for working professionals. This hybrid course combines live online learning with on-campus sessions, allowing you to upskill in Gen AI, Predictive Analytics, and Strategic Leadership without quitting your job.

If you want to lead the digital transformation, this is the course to watch.

Subscribe to Full Disclosure for the latest career and education updates!
